Max Lifespan (days)

What is "User Lifespan"?

User lifespan measures the time between a user's first ping and their last ping. A lifespan of 0 means the user only pinged once (single session). A longer lifespan indicates sustained engagement over time. Note: This metric shows the span of engagement, not continuous activity—a user with a 100-day lifespan may have been inactive for much of that time.

User Lifespan Distribution

How user engagement spans are distributed across time buckets

Lifespan Buckets

Detailed breakdown of user retention periods

Lifespan Bucket Users % of Total Distribution
0 (single session) 4,854 47.5%
<1-7 days 366 3.6%
1-4 weeks 1,731 16.9%
1-3 months 2,253 22.0%
3-6 months 611 6.0%
6-12 months 260 2.5%
>1 year 147 1.4%
